allow: PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "java" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, @{N='Cmd';E={\(Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.Id\)"\).CommandLine}} | Format-List)

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 46732 -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $env:CATALINA_HOME = "D:\\apache-tomcat-9.0.115"; $env:CATALINA_BASE = "D:\\apache-tomcat-9.0.115"; Start-Process -FilePath "D:\\apache-tomcat-9.0.115\\bin\\startup.bat" -WorkingDirectory "D:\\apache-tomcat-9.0.115\\bin" -WindowStyle Minimized; Write-Host "Tomcat restarting...")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; Get-Process -Name "java" | Where-Object { \(Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.Id\)"\).CommandLine -match "catalina" } | Select-Object Id, @{N='StartTime';E={$_.StartTime}})

PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5050 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; Write-Output "기존 프로세스 종료: PID $proc" } else { Write-Output "실행 중인 프로세스 없음" })

PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "dotnet" -ArgumentList "run", "--project", "C:\\PlcApiServer\\PlcApiServer.csproj" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\PlcApiServer" -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; $up = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5050 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "C# API 5050: $\(if\($up\){'UP'}else{'DOWN \(아직 기동중\)'}\)";)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; if \(Test-Path "D:\\12_log"\) { Get-ChildItem "D:\\12_log" | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1 | ForEach-Object { Get-Content $_.FullName | Select-Object -Last 20 } } else { Write-Output "D:\\12_log 없음" })
